data.title: SEC may consider Trump's proposal for six-month earnings reports; investor concerns downplayed by Chairman Paul Atkins.
data.description: Chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Paul Atkins, minimized worries regarding reduced information for investors. There are discussions within the SEC about a proposal from former President Trump to change quarterly earnings reports to biannual, or every six months. This proposed change aims to lessen the burden on companies and encourage a longer-term perspective among investors. At this point, the potential impact of this change on investors and the financial market remains uncertain.

data.title: RCS Real Estate Advisors aids in Ames Watson's acquisition of Claire's, keeping stores open for shoppers, specializing in retail restructuring. #RCSRealEstateAdvisors #retailacquisition #Claire's #AmesWatson
data.description: In New York, RCS Real Estate Advisors, a reputable retail real estate advisory firm, has revealed its significant involvement in facilitating Ames Watson's purchase of Claire's Holdings LLC in North America. Thanks to RCS's expertise, Ames Watson will sustain the popular retail brand known for ear piercings and affordable tween/teen accessories in a more efficient manner. This strategic move ensures the continuation of Claire's operations, highlighting its importance in the retail market.

data.title: Inventor from Pittsburgh creates collectible stuffed rat to change negative perceptions, model LJD-508.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, a new collectible stuffed rat was unveiled, challenging the common perception of rats as brown rodents that spread diseases. The creator aimed to showcase rats as clever, curious, tough, and talented creatures through this unique design. This initiative seeks to change how people view rats and redefine them as more than just carriers of illness. The project received attention for its innovative approach, emphasizing the positive qualities of these animals. This unconventional project aims to sell X number of these stuffed rats and promote a new perspective on these creatures.

data.title: Dickey’s Barbecue Pit's Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse Sausage to hit select Kroger stores in Dallas-Fort Worth on Sep 20, 2025 for a limited four-week run, featuring popular flavors - Brisket Burnt Ends, Bacon Cheddar, and Philly Cheese Steak.
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit revealed that the sought-after Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse Sausage series will be introduced in chosen Kroger outlets throughout Dallas-Fort Worth beginning September 20, 2025. This exclusive release will run for a limited period of four weeks. The Rancher’s Premium assortment, which was introduced in the spring of 2024, has rapidly gained popularity among customers for its genuine Texas-style smoked sausages featured in daring flavors like Brisket Burnt Ends, Bacon Cheddar, and Philly Cheese Steak. These sausages are meticulously prepared using high-quality meat cuts and a specially curated blend, offering a taste of authentic Texan flavor.

data.title: Shiba Inu burn rate surges 1,431% in single day after Dogecoin ETF debut. Shiba Inu price $0.00001303, market cap $7.7 billion.
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is experiencing an increase in its burn rate following Dogecoin's (DOGE) ETF debut that sparked the meme coin markets. As of now, SHIB is priced at $0.00001303 with a market cap of $7.7 billion, showing a 7-day trend decrease of 2%. On the other hand, DOGE is priced at $0.2656 with a market cap of $40.1 billion, marking a 7-day trend increase of 0.6%. Pepe (PEPE) is priced at $0.00001075 with a market cap of $4.5 billion, showing a 2.2% 7-day trend increase. Crypto trader Javon Marks has noted a confirmed bull signal for SHIB, predicting a potential 138% rally towards $0.000032. Timing is crucial, according to Marks. The setup for SHIB is still showing promising signs.

data.title: Trump hints at China approving TikTok deal after call with Xi Jinping. Details remain undisclosed.
data.description: After a recent conversation with China's President Xi Jinping, the commander-in-chief expressed gratitude on Truth Social for the TikTok approval. This interaction comes as a significant development in diplomatic relations between the two countries.

data.title: HBAR aiming for $0.28-$0.32 by October 2025 after recent drop; technical indicators point to bullish momentum.
data.description: Forecasts suggest HBAR could surge to $0.28-$0.32 in the next 4-6 weeks, backed by bullish technical indicators despite a recent drop of 3.64%.

data.title: Coinbase and OKX eyeing Australia's $2.8 trillion pension market, promoting crypto in self-managed super funds.
data.description: Two major global exchanges, Coinbase and OKX, are heavily investing in Australia's pension market, by promoting the inclusion of cryptocurrency in self-managed super funds. This move underscores the growing interest in digital assets within the country's retirement sector. Coinbase and OKX's efforts are aimed at tapping into Australia's significant pension reserves. These initiatives are anticipated to further boost the adoption of cryptocurrencies among investors looking to diversify their retirement portfolios.

data.title: Crypto drops, stocks reach new highs; SOL DeFi surges. AVAX & NEAR lead, XRP & DOGE ETF debut with $50m volume. Michigan BTC bill progresses, Brera Holdings launches $300m SOL DAT. ETH Fusaka upgrade in December. Plasma TGE on 25 Sept. PYUSD expands to Tron, Aave. Avantis adds tech stocks on-chain, enables 25x leverage. ASTER hits $3.8b FDV, $310m volume. BTC firm CEO pleads guilty in $200m ponzi, Canada seizes $40m from TradeOgre.
data.description: AVAX and NEAR are leading Layer 1 blockchain projects, while most alternative cryptocurrencies are experiencing a decline. XRP and DOGE have debuted ETFs, generating a combined $50 million in trading volume on the first day. MetaMask is set to release its token in the near future. A BTC bill in Michigan has progressed after a delay. Brera Holdings has introduced the SOL DAT fund with a total value of $300 million. Ethereum's Fusaka upgrade is scheduled for December. Plasma's TGE is scheduled for September 25th. Circle is facing significant competition from JP Morgan. PYUSD is expanding to Tron, Aave, and other blockchain platforms. Avantis has added top technology stocks to its platform and allows 25x leverage trading. ASTER's market cap has reached $3.8 billion, with a $310 million spot volume on the TGE launch. The CEO of a BTC trading firm has pleaded guilty to running a $200 million ponzi scheme. Canada has seized $40 million in cryptocurrency from TradeOgre.

Porsche faces notable extra costs, including tariffs, and plans to propose a 2025 dividend much higher than its current policy. The company also announced a delay in launching some all-electric vehicle models.
